== Notes for [[Item:Q106675|Q106675]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth): 130 AH (748 AD)
* Wafaat (Death):

Source 1: http://www.al-islam.org/masoom/bios/7thimam.html

Source 2: http://www.ismaili.net/histoire/history04/history407.html

Source 3: http://www.ismaili.net/histoire/history04/history408.html

Source 4: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Muhammad_ibn_Ismail

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000018898808662

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
